summary: Completed E2E verification of Addrika self-pickup checkout UI text changes and Track Order page. All features tested successfully: promotional text, token payment text ('Fully adjusted at pickup', 'Prevents fake reservations'), dynamic balance calculation, time slots, store selection, and coupon code visibility toggle.

promotional_text.text: For faster service, choose pickup from your nearest Authorized Addrika Retailer.
promotional_text.location: Below delivery mode title, gold/italic styling

pickup_option.label: Self-Pickup from Store
pickup_option.sub_label: No shipping charges • Pay at store option

token_payment_option.title: Pay ₹11 Token Now
token_payment_option.fully_adjusted_text: Fully adjusted at pickup • Pay ₹99 at store

dynamic_balance_calculation.display_text: You have prepaid ₹11. Pay no more than ₹99 at store to collect your order.

time_slots.validation: Please select a pickup time slot

coupon_code_visibility.shipping_mode: VISIBLE with Enter code input, Apply button, and hints (TESTDISCOUNT10, HOLISPECIAL2026)

track_order_page.note: Status timeline switches between shipping (5 steps) and self-pickup (3 steps) based on delivery_mode

find_retailers_page.map: Leaflet map with store markers working

critical_code_review_comments: Checkout.jsx properly implements all self-pickup UI elements with correct data-testid attributes
TrackOrder.jsx has correct self-pickup status handling (lines 120-176): pending_pickup, ready_for_pickup, collected
FindRetailers.jsx correctly displays WhatsApp and Email buttons with retailer contact info
Retailer email notifications (retailer_emails.py) include dynamic balance text with token prepaid amounts
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user from iteration_19
context_for_next_testing_agent: All self-pickup UI text changes verified. Token payment shows 'Fully adjusted at pickup' and 'Prevents fake reservations'. Dynamic balance calculation working (₹110 cart - ₹11 token = ₹99 at store). Track Order page has self-pickup status timeline. Find Retailers page shows test emails: amitkumar.911@proton.me (Delhi), mr.amitbgp@gmail.com (Bhagalpur). Razorpay integration is live - test only up to payment initiation.
verification_screenshots: .screenshots/18_payment_option_panel.png - Token payment with 'Fully adjusted at pickup' and 'Prevents fake reservations' text
.screenshots/20_find_retailers.png - Find Retailers with emails and WhatsApp
